india_trends.title: Niti Aayog to strengthen model concession agreement framework for multi-modal logistics parks
india_trends.summary: Niti Aayog is actively working on improving frameworks for major infrastructure projects. This includes updating agreements for multi-modal logistics parks to boost their viability. The think tank is also involved in redeveloping railway stations in Vijayawada and creating a public-private partnersh

india_trends.title: Sebi proposes overhaul of municipal bond rules to deepen urban infrastructure financing market
india_trends.summary: Key changes proposed include pooled bond issuances, stricter disclosure norms, and incentives for retail investors, aimed at addressing infrastructure funding needs amid rapid urbanization.

india_trends.title: Clean Max Enviro Energy shares surge 7% after strong Q4 earnings; up 70% in under 2 months
india_trends.summary: Clean Max Enviro Energy Solutions shares rose 7% to ₹1,309 after strong March quarter results, with 25% revenue growth. Net profit surged 165% to ₹45.4 crore, driven by renewable energy sales, especially from the data and AI segment, which now contributes 42% to its portfolio.

india_trends.title: Tata Motors posts stellar Q4 results: Should you buy this Tata group stock after earnings?
india_trends.summary: The demerged Tata Motors arm, on 13 May, posted a massive 69.56% year-on-year (YoY) jump in its standalone profit to ₹2,406 crore for Q4FY26. The profit stood at ₹1,419 crore in the same period last year.

india_trends.title: Jio Financial and Allianz Group formally launch 50:50 insurance JV
india_trends.summary: Jio Allianz General Insurance has been incorporated. Jio Financial Services and Germany's Allianz each hold a 50 percent stake. india_trends.title: Gold financier stocks jump after the government hikes import duty on precious metals
india_trends.summary: The recent hike in import duties on gold and silver to 15% has led to a significant surge in gold financier stocks. This increase is driven by rising gold prices, enhancing loan collateral values and boosting demand for gold-backed loans. Explore how this affects the market landscape.

india_trends.title: Uncertainty scars J&K’s economy and impacts banking, but resilience here is remarkable: Amitava Chatterjee, J&K Bank
india_trends.summary: Jammu and Kashmir Bank has recorded its highest profit to date, soaring to Rs 2363.47 crore in FY-26. This achievement marks a significant recovery from past hardships, says bank chief Amitava Chatterjee.

india_trends.title: Sebi weighs wider net for intraday borrowing by mutual funds
india_trends.summary: Sebi said restricting borrowing only to redemption payouts and guaranteed receivables could impair fund management flexibility and potentially hurt scheme returns.

india_trends.title: Anant Raj to evaluate demerger of data center business, appoints Anish Sarin as director
india_trends.summary: Anant Raj Ltd is exploring a demerger for its data center business. A committee has been formed to evaluate the move. The company has also appointed Anish Sarin as a Director. Anant Raj Ltd has reported significant financial growth and a strengthened balance sheet.
